name: First Baptist Church Kimberling City
description: First Baptist Church Kimberling City is a place to play pickleball in Kimberling City, MO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Port of Kimberling Marina & Resort
description: Port of Kimberling Marina & Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kimberling City, MO. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. Players have access to food and restrooms. The courts are free.
